message:
🌱 Add keda: Prometheus scaler - add option to consider null values as mission (#1313)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

@@ -0,0 +1,75 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "keda-3065-prometheus-scaler-add-option-to-consider-null-values-as-errors",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "keda: Prometheus scaler - add option to consider null values as errors",
+    "description": "Prometheus scaler - add option to consider null values as errors. Requested by 12+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current keda deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your keda version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n keda -l app.kubernetes.io/name=keda\nhelm list -n keda 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working keda installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review keda configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant keda configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n keda -l app.kubernetes.io/name=keda\nkubectl get configmap -n keda -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=keda\n```\n### Proposal\n\nAdd option to consider null values as errors\n\n### Use-Case\n\nWe heavily rely on KEDA on our prod, had an incident and I’m looking for ways to circumvent such cases in the future."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Prometheus scaler - add option to consider null values as…",
+        "description": "_Provide a description of what has been changed_\n- [N/A] A PR is opened to update our Helm chart ([repo](https://github.com/kedacore/charts)) *(if applicable, ie. when deployment manifests are modified)*\r\nRelates to https://github.com/kedacore/keda/issues/3064\nRelates to https://github.com/kedacore/keda-docs/pull/769 (docs)\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n keda -l app.kubernetes.io/name=keda\nkubectl get events -n keda --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Prometheus scaler - add option to consider null values as…\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "_Provide a description of what has been changed_\n- [N/A] A PR is opened to update our Helm chart ([repo](https://github.com/kedacore/charts)) *(if applicable, ie. when deployment manifests are modified)*\r\nRelates to https://github.com/kedacore/keda/issues/3064\nRelates to https://github.com/kedacore/keda-docs/pull/769 (docs)",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
